title: Sweeter Than Wine

sections.label: Intro
lines: Oh, how you adore me, your eyes never stray,
Like a prince before his queen, you call my name.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Your feet in sandals, oh, how they dance,
Graceful as lilies in love’s wild expanse.
Your navel a goblet, filled with delight,
Your waist a garden in the soft silver light.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Come away, my love, let us run through the vines,
Where passion awakens and hearts intertwine.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Your love is sweeter than the finest wine,
A melody that lingers through endless time.
Hold me closer, let our souls ignite,
Forever bound in love’s pure light.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Your hands are like gold, your form strong and tall,
Like cedars of Lebanon, steadfast through all.
Your lips drip with honey, your breath scented sweet,
Oh, my beloved, how my heart skips its beat.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Come away, my love, let us chase the dawn,
Through vineyards where love’s fragrance lingers on.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Your love is sweeter than the finest wine,
A melody that lingers through endless time.
Hold me closer, let our souls ignite,
Forever bound in love’s pure light.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: I am my beloved’s, and he calls me near,
With love like the waters, steady and clear.
I am yours forever, sealed upon your heart,
No force nor time shall pull us apart.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Your love is sweeter than the finest wine,
A melody that lingers through endless time.
Hold me closer, let our souls ignite,
Forever bound in love’s pure light.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Come away, my love…
Forever yours, forever mine.

epigraph: Thy navel is like a round goblet
lyricEyebrow: From the Book of Song of Songs
styleNote: Soaring Harmony) · Breathless With Devotion) · With Powerful Emotion)
